policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="corsMapping" value="@(context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />
        <set-variable name="validationResult" value="@{
            var raw = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("corsMapping", "");
            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(raw)) { return "Request body is empty"; }
            try
            {
                var obj = JObject.Parse(raw);
                if (obj.Count == 0) { return "JSON object has no API mappings"; }
                foreach (var prop in obj.Properties())
                {
                    if (!(prop.Value is JArray)) { return "Value for key '" + prop.Name + "' must be an array of origin strings"; }
                }
                return "";
            }
            catch (Exception ex) { return "Invalid JSON: " + ex.Message; }
        }" />
        
            <when condition="@(!string.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("validationResult", "")))">
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        return new JObject(
                            new JProperty("error", (string)context.Variables["validationResult"])
                        ).ToString();
                    }
                
            
        
        
        
        
            
            
                application/json
            
            @{
                var mapping = (string)context.Variables["corsMapping"];
                var obj = JObject.Parse(mapping);
                return new JObject(
                    new JProperty("status", "CORS origin cache loaded successfully"),
                    new JProperty("apiCount", obj.Count),
                    new JProperty("cacheKey", "corsOriginMapping"),
                    new JProperty("ttl", "infinite (2147483647s)")
                ).ToString();
            }
